zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Henry de Beeston於1290年出生在英國英格蘭爾貝斯頓時，他的父親Lord David de Beeston45歲，母親Agnes de Bonbury32歲。他於1320年與Ellen在英國英格蘭爾貝斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1342年在英國爾貝斯頓享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Henry de Beeston于1290年出生在英国英格兰爾貝斯頓时，他的父亲Lord David de Beeston45岁，母亲Agnes de Bonbury32岁。他于1320年与Ellen在英国英格兰爾貝斯頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1342年在英国爾貝斯頓享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beeston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of the many places in England so called. Those in Nottinghamshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire were settlements where bent grass grew (Old English bēos ‘rough grass’ + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’). In Bedfordshire it probably denoted a settlement on a bend (Old English byge + genitive singular -es + tūn). The hamlet stands on a marked bend of the river Yvel. In Cheshire it is named from a rock, below which trading took place (Old English byge ‘commerce’ + Old English stān ‘stone’). The reference is to a prominent crag where the remains of Beeston Castle stand. Compare Beaston and Beeson .
occasionally a topographic name for someone who lived in that part of a village known in Middle English as bi este toun ‘(place) at the east (end) of the village’.

variants.name: Beston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   and   Beaston  .

variants.name: Beeson
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston  , a habitational name from a place called Beeston. The spelling reflects the local pronunciation of the Nottinghamshire placename, although this form is now quite widespread in England.

variants.name: Beaston
meanings: English: variant of   Beeston   (the more common form of the surname in England), a habitational name from any of various places called Beeston.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Henry de Beeston was born in 1290, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord David de Beeston, was 45 and his mother, Agnes de Bonbury, was 32. He married Ellen in 1320, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died about 1342, in Beeston, Cheshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Henry de Beeston est né en 1290, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord David de Beeston, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Bonbury, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Ellen en 1320, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé environ 1342, à Beeston, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Henry de Beeston 1290 in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord David de Beeston 45 und seine Mutter Agnes de Bonbury 32. Er hat 1320 in Beeston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1342 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Beeston, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Henry de Beeston è nato il nel 1290 nel Beeston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord David de Beeston, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Bonbury, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Ellen nel 1320, nel Beeston, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì circa 1342, nel Beeston, Cheshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Henry de Beestonが1290年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで生まれた時，父Lord David de Beestonは45歳，母Agnes de Bonburyは32歳であった。1320年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンでEllenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は約1342年にイギリスチェシュアイアビーストンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Henry de Beeston(이)가 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord David de Beeston(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Bonbury(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브이스턴에서 Ellen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1342년 영국 체실르 브이스턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Henry de Beeston nasceu em 1290, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord David de Beeston, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Bonbury, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen em 1320, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1342, em Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Henry de Beeston родился в 1290 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord David de Beeston было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Bonbury, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen в 1320 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер около 1342 г. в местности бистон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Henry de Beeston nació en 1290, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord David de Beeston, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Agnes de Bonbury, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Ellen en 1320, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1342, en Beeston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
